ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the character */,
  "game_index" INTEGER /* Index of the game the character is associated with */,
  "char_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "char_type" TEXT /* Type of character */,
  "char_level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "char_experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "char_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the character was created */,
  "char_last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the character was last updated */,
  "char_status" TEXT /* Status of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_game_index FOREIGN KEY ("game_index") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "stat_category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic */,
  "stat_min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value the statistic can have */,
  "stat_max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value the statistic can have */,
  "stat_default_value" INTEGER /* Default value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_statistics" (
  "char_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-statistic relationship */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic for the character */,
  "char_stat_lock" INTEGER /* Indicates if the statistic is locked */,
  "char_stat_date_set" TEXT /* Date the statistic was set or last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_statistics_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_statistics_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavors" (
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor */,
  "flavor_name" TEXT /* Name of the flavor */,
  "flavor_description" TEXT /* Description of the flavor */,
  "flavor_type" TEXT /* Type of flavor */,
  "flavor_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the flavor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_flavors" (
  "char_flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-flavor relationship */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preference of the character for the flavor */,
  "char_flavor_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the preference */,
  "char_flavor_date_set" TEXT /* Date the preference was set or last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavors_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavors_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "mode_max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the mode */,
  "mode_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_modes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_characters" (
  "game_char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-character relationship */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "game_char_status" TEXT /* Status of the character in the game */,
  "game_char_role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_characters_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_characters_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_flavors" (
  "game_flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-flavor relationship */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor */,
  "game_flavor_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the flavor in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_flavors_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_flavors_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_characters" (
  "user_char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-character relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "user_char_status" TEXT /* Status of the user-character relationship */,
  "user_char_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the character is a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_characters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_characters_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_games" (
  "user_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-game relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "user_game_status" TEXT /* Status of the user-game relationship */,
  "user_game_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_games_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_stats_history" (
  "stat_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character statistic history */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was updated */,
  "char_stat_change_type" TEXT /* Type of change */,
  "char_stat_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_history_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_history_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_flavor_history" (
  "flavor_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character flavor history */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preference of the character for the flavor */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was updated */,
  "char_flavor_change_type" TEXT /* Type of change */,
  "char_flavor_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavor_history_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavor_history_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_history" (
  "game_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game history */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the game was updated */,
  "game_state" TEXT /* State of the game */,
  "game_update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "game_update_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "user_activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity */,
  "user_activity_device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes_history" (
  "mode_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode history */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the game mode was updated */,
  "mode_state" TEXT /* State of the game mode */,
  "mode_update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "mode_update_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_modes_history_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_game_history" (
  "char_game_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character game history */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the character was updated in the game */,
  "game_state" TEXT /* State of the character in the game */,
  "char_game_update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "char_game_update_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_game_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_game_history_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_game_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
